testcase.name: shouldUploadIndexSearchAndReturnCitations
shouldExplainOilFumeThresholdQuestionClearly

testcase.name: shouldExecuteExplicitPlanStepIdempotently
shouldTreatIdleLandClassificationQuestionAsPolicyQuestion

shouldComposeAnswerUsingPersistedKnowledgeArtifact
shouldCreateAndQueryPlanForComplexAnalysisTask

testcase.name: shouldPreviewAndExecuteReadonlyQuery
shouldRouteHighRiskQuestionToLegalReview
shouldCancelAndResumeRun
shouldAutoRunTodoDependenciesWhenExecutingAnswerStep
shouldExecutePlanStepsForDataAnalysisTask
shouldPersistParsedQuestionForRun
shouldAutoRecoverAnswerDependenciesBeforeCompose
shouldExposeAuditApis
shouldExecuteDependentPlanStepUsingPersistedArtifact
shouldForceSimpleDataQuestionThroughTrustedQueryFlow
